title: rinorea ternifolia
intro: Rinorea ternifolia, also known as the three-leaved Rinorea or three-leafed vine, is a plant species in the family Violaceae. It is a climbing vine with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and treating wounds. Rinorea ternifolia is often prepared into herbal tea or infusions for medicinal use.
